data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a temporary equipment loan during repair. While the linked use case mentions that a loaner mini-fridge is offered during repair, there is no concrete evidence from API reads or persisted state checks to confirm that this requirement is actively fulfilled in the system. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not demonstrate that the loan process is implemented or functioning as expected.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the temporary equipment loan process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
